meta.title: Azure & Co. — Luxury Travel Planning · v30 Capri
meta.description: Luxury travel planning for unforgettable experiences. Template concept.

sections.slotTag: slot foto/video — mar abierto desde la cubierta

sections.script: travel planning with heart, soul & style
sections.h: From <u>Mediterranean coastlines</u> to fun family escapes — designed to feel effortless.
sections.p: Azure & Co. creates elevated itineraries with insider access and zero logistics left to you. Placeholder copy for the template concept — every trip fully custom.

rows.d: Door-to-door plans built around your pace, your people, your palate.
The once-in-a-lifetime trip, handled like it matters — because it does.
Multi-generational logistics smoothed into pure vacation.
Milestones abroad — villas, tables, and toasts arranged.

sections.head: Planning that feels like part of the vacation.

steps.d: Your dates, your dreams, your dealbreakers — thirty unhurried minutes.
A tailored itinerary with insider options you won't find searching alone.
We refine until it's exactly right — then book, confirm, and brief you.
You travel; we stay on call. Every detail already handled.

sections.slotTag: slot foto — piscina del hotel al mediodía

sections.q: Every restaurant, every transfer, every view — it all just worked. We didn't open a single logistics app for ten days.

sections.head: Free Guide
sections.p: The placeholder packing-and-planning checklist we send every client before takeoff — timing, tipping, and the one thing everyone forgets.
